Package org.cyclops.integratedmekanism.value

Class ValueObjectTypeChemicalStack

public class ValueObjectTypeChemicalStack extends org.cyclops.integrateddynamics.core.evaluate.variable.ValueObjectTypeBase<ValueObjectTypeChemicalStack.ValueChemicalStack> implements org.cyclops.integrateddynamics.api.evaluate.variable.IValueTypeNamed<ValueObjectTypeChemicalStack.ValueChemicalStack>, org.cyclops.integrateddynamics.api.evaluate.variable.IValueTypeUniquelyNamed<ValueObjectTypeChemicalStack.ValueChemicalStack>, org.cyclops.integrateddynamics.api.evaluate.variable.IValueTypeNullable<ValueObjectTypeChemicalStack.ValueChemicalStack>
Value type with values that are fluidstacks.
